Contact

Contact Us

For business inquiries, partnership discussions, customer support, or compliance-related communications, please use the channels below. We aim to respond within one to two business days (excluding public holidays).

Business inquiries

Email

contact@vorynex.in

Use this channel for corporate discussions, enterprise onboarding, documentation requests, and invoicing coordination.

Customer support

Email

support@vorynex.in

For service access issues, billing questions, account concerns, and general assistance. Please include relevant identifiers (order ID / invoice ID / registered email) for faster resolution.

Registered office

Registered Office Address: Plot No 56, Vikram Nagar, Akk Road Solapur - 413006 , Maharashtra

For formal notices and regulatory correspondence, please email first so we can route your request to the appropriate compliance point of contact.

Compliance communications

VORYNEX PRIVATE LIMITED maintains published legal policies and a documented support process. If your request relates to privacy, data security, payment verification, KYC/underwriting review, or policy clarifications, please contact contact@vorynex.in with the subject line “Compliance Request”.

We may request additional information to verify identity and protect customer data before sharing account-specific details.

Response timelines

  • - General inquiries: typically within 1–2 business days
  • - Billing/refund reviews (where applicable): acknowledgment within 2 business days; resolution typically within 7–10 business days
  • - Privacy/security matters: prioritized handling based on risk and verification requirements

VORYNEX PRIVATE LIMITED

Technology company providing SaaS-based digital solutions, workflow services, business utilities, and online software services.
